userStories.title: Load IFR (32019R2033) - regimen prudencial ESI
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM norma WHERE codigo IN ('32019R2033','32019L2034')"); echo "IFR+IFD: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix reporting prudencial - sociedad_valores y agencia_valores (IFR, no CRR)
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE descripcion ILIKE '%prudencial%' AND perfil_codigo IN ('sociedad_valores','agencia_valores') AND norma_codigo='32019R2033' AND verified=true"); echo "IFR fixed: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix conflictos de interes y mejor ejecucion - articulos LIVMC concretos
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE descripcion ILIKE '%conflictos%' OR descripcion ILIKE '%mejor ejecucion%' AND perfil_codigo IN ('sociedad_valores','agencia_valores') AND verified=true"); echo "LIVMC articles fixed: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix Modelo 187 - articulo RD 1082/2012 concreto
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE descripcion ILIKE '%Modelo 187%' AND norma_codigo='RD_1082_2012' AND articulo_referencia IS NOT NULL AND verified=true"); echo "M187 fixed: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix Modelo 198 - norma y articulo concretos
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE descripcion ILIKE '%Modelo 198%' AND norma_codigo='LIRPF' AND verified=true"); echo "M198 fixed: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix Modelo 289 CRS - articulo LGT concreto, verified=true condicional
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE descripcion ILIKE '%Modelo 289%' AND articulo_referencia='art. 93 bis' AND verified=true"); echo "M289 fixed: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix Modelo 290 FATCA - norma y articulo concretos
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE descripcion ILIKE '%Modelo 290%' AND norma_codigo='LGT' AND verified=true"); echo "M290 fixed: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix certificacion MiFID II personal - articulo concreto
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE descripcion ILIKE '%Certificacion MiFID II%' AND norma_codigo='32014L0065' AND verified=true"); echo "MiFID cert fixed: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 2 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix SGIIC - consolidar duplicado AIFMD Annex IV y completar articulos
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; TOTAL=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='sgiic'"); VER=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='sgiic' AND verified=true"); echo "sgiic total=$TOTAL verified=$VER"; [ "$VER" -ge 16 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Fix empresa_servicios_pago PBC/FT condicional - articulo correcto
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM obligacion_perfil WHERE perfil_codigo='empresa_servicios_pago' AND verified=false"); echo "ESP remaining evidence_limited: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -eq 0 ] && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final diagnostic - verified rate and residual evidence_limited
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; $COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -c "SELECT perfil_codigo, COUNT(*) total, SUM(CASE WHEN verified THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) verified, ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN verified THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0),1) pct FROM obligacion_perfil GROUP BY perfil_codigo ORDER BY pct DESC" && echo PASS

userStories.title: Update mcp_validation_suite - verified rate checks
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_validation_suite.py --read-only --base-url http://api:8000 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm ops python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification - Sprint F complete
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep 'passed' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT ROUND(100.0*SUM(CASE WHEN verified THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*),1) FROM obligacion_perfil" | awk '{if ($1>=75) print "PASS: overall " $1 "%"; else print "FAIL: only " $1 "%"}'
